title: TFSA Contribution Room & Limits (2026 Calculator)
description: Interactive 2026 TFSA contribution room calculator. Find your exact limit, see the history of changes from 2009-2026, and track your cumulative room.

mainEntity.name: What is the TFSA contribution room for 2026?

acceptedAnswer.text: The TFSA contribution limit for 2026 is $7,000. This is the same limit as 2025 and 2024.

mainEntity.name: What is the cumulative TFSA limit for 2026?

acceptedAnswer.text: The cumulative TFSA contribution limit for 2026 is $109,000. This applies if you were born in 1991 or earlier, have been a Canadian resident since 2009, and have never contributed to a TFSA before.

mainEntity.name: How is TFSA contribution room calculated?

acceptedAnswer.text: Your TFSA contribution room is calculated by adding your annual TFSA limits for every year since 2009 that you were 18 or older and a resident of Canada, minus any contributions you have made, plus any withdrawals you made in previous years.

mainEntity.name: Do I get my TFSA room back if I withdraw money?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Any amount you withdraw from your TFSA is added back to your contribution room, but not until the following calendar year (January 1st).

mainEntity.name: What happens if I overcontribute to my TFSA?

acceptedAnswer.text: If you contribute more than your available room, the CRA will charge a penalty tax of 1% per month on the highest excess amount in the month. You should withdraw the excess amount immediately to stop the penalty from growing.
